metodos.codigoOriginal:
lcQuery = [Select IClis, RClis, Inativas ] + ;
		    [From SigCdCli ] + ;
		   [Where GerBals = 1]

If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, 'crSigCdCli') < 1)
	=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (crSigCdCli)')
	Return 0
EndIf
Select crSigCdCli
Index On IClis Tag Iclis
Index On IClis Tag BalCodigo
Index On RClis Tag BalNome
* Fim **************************************************************************************

lcQuery = [Select Codigos, Descrs, GerBals ] + ;
		    [From SigCdGcr]

If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, 'crSigCdGcr') < 1)
	=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (crSigCdGcr)')
	Return 0
EndIf
Select crSigCdGcr
Index On Codigos Tag BalCodigo For GerBals = 1
Index On Descrs  Tag BalDescrs For GerBals = 1
Index On Codigos Tag Codigos
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If ThisForm.Chk_Percent.Value = 1
	Report Form SigReAu2 Preview NoConsole
Else
	Report Form SigReAu1 Preview NoConsole
Endif

If Used('crSigCdCli')
	Use In crSigCdCli
EndIf
If Used('crSigCdGcr')
	Use In crSigCdGcr
EndIf

=DoDefault()

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		=DoDefault()
	Else
		=Messagebox('Impossivel Efetuar Conexăo com Servidor de Banco de Dados...', 0+48, 'CreateObject')

	EndIf
EndWith

If Thisform.Chk_Percent.Value = 1

If (This.Value <> 4) && Se Năo Clicou em Saída
	If Empty(ThisForm.get_dt_inicial.value)
		=Messagebox('Data Inicial Inválida!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.get_dt_inicial.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf

	If Empty(ThisForm.get_dt_final.value)
		=Messagebox('Data Final Inválida!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.get_dt_final.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf
